Gastro Range – Franchise Available Across AP

Gastro Range Pharma Franchise in Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma offers a pharma franchise for the gastro range across Andhra Pradesh. Our flagship gastro product Pansenim-DSR (Pantoprazole 40mg + Domperidone 30mg SR) provides dual-action relief for GERD, dyspepsia, and acid-peptic disorders — one of the most prescribed gastro combinations in AP general practice.

💊 Pantoprazole 40mg + Domperidone 30mg SR ✅ WHO GMP Certified 📍 AP-wide franchise available 🏥 Widely prescribed by GPs & GE specialists
💬 Enquire via WhatsApp All Franchise Info
Market

Gastro: One of India's Highest-Volume Prescription Categories

Gastrointestinal complaints — acid reflux, GERD, dyspepsia, and peptic ulcers — are among the top three reasons patients visit general practitioners across India, and Andhra Pradesh is no exception. The local diet's spice and oil content, combined with stress and rising NSAID usage, drives consistently high gastro prescription demand across all 13 AP coastal belt districts.

Pantoprazole is the dominant PPI in this segment, and DSR (Delayed Sustained Release) combinations with Domperidone address both acid suppression and gastric motility — making them the first-choice combination for GPs and gastroenterologists treating GERD with dyspepsia simultaneously.

  • GI complaints are consistently in the top 3 GP consultation reasons across AP
  • Pantoprazole DSR combinations are among the fastest-moving gastro products
  • Prescribed by GPs, gastroenterologists, surgeons, physicians, and gynaecologists
  • NSAID prescriptions from orthopaedic/surgical practices drive acid-suppression co-prescriptions
  • Strong seasonal demand during festival and high-stress periods
  • Consistent pharmacy counter demand — both prescription and OTC behaviour
Gastro Product

Pansenim-DSR – Crasenim Pharma

Pansenim-DSR
Pantoprazole 40mg + Domperidone 30mg SR Form: Capsules (DSR — Delayed Sustained Release) WHO GMP Certified Manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS
Franchise Available

Indications

  • GERD (Gastro-Oesophageal Reflux Disease)
  • Functional dyspepsia and nausea
  • NSAID-induced gastric ulcers (prevention and treatment)
  • Acid peptic disorder with motility component
  • Post-surgical gastric emptying support

Dual Action Benefits

  • Pantoprazole: Irreversible PPI — potent acid suppression
  • Domperidone SR: Improves gastric motility and reduces nausea
  • DSR technology separates drug release kinetics for optimal synergy
  • Once-daily dosing — 24-hour symptom control
Franchise

Gastro Franchise Opportunity Across AP

PCD Franchise

Exclusive Gastro Territory

Own the rights to the Pansenim-DSR franchise in your AP district. High-velocity prescription product with GP, specialist, and surgical practice prescribers — broad customer base for franchise growth.

Commission MR

Gastro Commission Sales

Promote Pansenim-DSR to GPs, gastroenterologists, surgeons, and gynaecologists. Earn commission on every prescription generated in your Andhra Pradesh territory.

Distributor

Gastro Range Distribution

Stock and distribute Pansenim-DSR to pharmacies and hospital dispensaries. One of the fastest-moving SKUs in any retail pharmacy — reliable stock turnover and repeat orders.

FAQs

Gastro Range Franchise – FAQ

What makes Pansenim-DSR different from a plain Pantoprazole tablet?
Pansenim-DSR combines Pantoprazole 40mg (acid suppression) with Domperidone 30mg SR (gastric motility + anti-nausea). The DSR formulation ensures each component is released at the optimal time. This dual-action approach addresses both acid and motility symptoms simultaneously — making it preferred over Pantoprazole alone for GERD with dyspepsia.
Which types of doctors prescribe Pansenim-DSR most?
General Physicians (bulk of prescriptions), Gastroenterologists, General Surgeons (post-surgical use), Gynaecologists (pregnancy-associated nausea/reflux), Orthopedicians and Rheumatologists (NSAID cover prescriptions).
Is the gastro franchise available across all AP districts?
Yes. Pansenim-DSR franchise is available across all major AP coastal belt districts. High-demand cities like Visakhapatnam, Vijayawada, Kakinada, Rajahmundry, and Eluru have particularly strong gastro prescription volumes.

Pantoprazole-Domperidone franchise, commission-based gastro MR, and stockist opportunities across Andhra Pradesh.
